No error message for Country field on what-exporters-address page


Key details
Description

Issue 1 - 

Steps to Reproduce:

navigate to what-exporters-address page 

Enter some invalid value in Country field e.g., '@'

Click on Save and continue 

Expected Result:
Country field should throw an error when entered invalid value 

Actual Result:
no error is displayed


image-20260504-100957.png
Issue 2 - 


Steps to Reproduce:

navigate to what-exporters-address page 

Click on Save and continue without entering any values

Expected Result:
Error message should be displayed for each field on the summary table

Actual Result:
summary table has only one error message


image-20260504-102742.png
NOTE: The above 2 issues persist on all the journeys i.e., CC, PS, NMD

reference:  https://eaflood.atlassian.net/browse/FI0-11275
